Title: XML Column Type
Description: Virtuoso allows for native XML storage in a database table column using the LONG XML type.
This data type is a variation of LONG VARCHAR that can have plain text or XML entities, persistent or non-persistent values.
but will always return an XML entity when selected
Since ODBC does not support an XML entity type this column will appear as a LONG VARCHAR when selected from ODBC based clients.
Examples:
INSERT INTO xml_col_test (id, txt, xmltxt)
  VALUES (1, 'test', '<xml><test>test</test><test>test2</test></xml>');

INSERT INTO xml_col_test (id, txt, xmltxt)
  VALUES (2, 'test', xml_tree_doc('<xml><test>test</test><test>test2</test></xml>'));
